# BUG-004 Writeup
> Generated by [Quality Playbook](https://github.com/andrewstellman/quality-playbook) v1.4.6 — Andrew Stellman
> Date: 2026-04-20 · Project: virtio-1.4.6

## 1. Summary

REQ-007 requires admin queues to use their dedicated metadata owner, but `drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_modern.c:600-603,640-641` always indexes `vp_dev->vqs[]` even when the queue is the admin VQ.

## 2. Why this is a bug

Teardown already knows admin queues live in `vp_dev->admin_vq.info`, so the reset helpers are inconsistent with the actual ownership model. If an admin queue reaches these helpers, they dereference the wrong metadata slot.

## 3. Regression test

- **Requirement:** REQ-007
- **Test:** `quality/test_regression.py::TestCodeReviewRegressions.test_bug_004_admin_queue_reset_helpers_use_admin_metadata_slot`
- **Regression patch:** `quality/patches/BUG-004-regression-test.patch`

## 4. FAIL -> PASS evidence

```text
RED: Command: python3 <direct regression assertion runner> test_bug_004_admin_queue_reset_helpers_use_admin_metadata_slot
RED: AssertionError: 'vp_dev->admin_vq.info' not found in queue-reset helper bodies
GREEN: Command: python3 <temp source patcher BUG-004> && python3 <direct regression assertion runner> test_bug_004_admin_queue_reset_helpers_use_admin_metadata_slot
GREEN: test_bug_004_admin_queue_reset_helpers_use_admin_metadata_slot: PASS
```

See `quality/results/BUG-004.red.log` and `quality/results/BUG-004.green.log`.

## 5. Challenge gate

`quality/challenge/BUG-004-challenge.md` -> **CONFIRMED**

## 6. The fix

- **Fix patch:** `quality/patches/BUG-004-fix.patch`

```diff
diff --git a/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_modern.c b/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_modern.c
index 4444444..5555555 100644
--- a/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_modern.c
+++ b/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_modern.c
@@ -599,7 +599,8 @@ static int vp_modern_disable_vq_and_reset(struct virtqueue *vq)
 
 	vp_modern_set_queue_reset(mdev, vq->index);
 
-	info = vp_dev->vqs[vq->index];
+	info = vp_is_avq(vq->vdev, vq->index) ? vp_dev->admin_vq.info :
+						vp_dev->vqs[vq->index];
 @@ -638,7 +639,8 @@ static int vp_modern_enable_vq_after_reset(struct virtqueue *vq)
 		return -EBUSY;
 
 	index = vq->index;
-	info = vp_dev->vqs[index];
+	info = vp_is_avq(vq->vdev, index) ? vp_dev->admin_vq.info :
+					     vp_dev->vqs[index];
```
